summary: Completed comprehensive testing of layer control unification in Research View. All requirements successfully verified - old buttons removed, ViewModeSelector working, mode switching functional, bottom controls operational.
passed_tests: ✅ Old layer toggle buttons (Base/Patterns/Levels) successfully removed from top bar
✅ ViewModeSelector present and functional at bottom of chart
✅ All four view modes (Auto/Classic TA/Smart Money/Minimal) working correctly
✅ Mode switching functionality operational - buttons clickable and responsive
✅ Bottom control buttons (Fibonacci/Pattern/Setup) present and functional
✅ No duplication of layer control logic - unified through ViewModeSelector
✅ Layer visibility changes when switching between modes
✅ Chart displays properly with technical analysis overlays
✅ Market context and technical setup panels displaying correctly
